overview: Men's Health Express provides testosterone replacement therapy and related men's health services including ED treatment, hair loss care, and pain recovery therapy. Care is delivered through office and telehealth visits with comprehensive lab monitoring and long-term health management.
highlights: Comprehensive lab panels, annual EKG, and therapeutic phlebotomy when indicated
Also offers ED treatment with shockwave therapy, hair loss care, and muscle recovery therapy
targetAudience: Men experiencing symptoms of low testosterone, erectile dysfunction, hair loss, or seeking pain and injury recovery treatment.
